---
title: "Method Overview"
---

## Architecture Summary

- **Input pipeline**: preprocessing → feature extraction → normalisation
- **Core model**: [e.g., MLP with LayerNorm + residual connections]
- **Training objective**: loss function + regularisation terms
- **Inference path**: forward pass → postprocessing → structured output

```{dot}
//| label: fig-arch
//| fig-cap: "High-level architecture: input → model → output"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.5
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.55]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Raw   [label="Raw Input", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Meta  [label="Metadata", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Prior [label="Prior / Config", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    Comp_A [label="Component A"]
    Comp_B [label="Component B"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Loss  [label="Loss", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    Out   [label="Prediction", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  Raw   -> Comp_A
  Meta  -> Comp_A
  Meta  -> Comp_B
  Prior -> Comp_B
  Comp_A -> Loss
  Comp_A -> Out
  Comp_B -> Loss
  Comp_B -> Out
}
```

---

## Design Principles

- **Modularity**: each component has a single responsibility; components are swappable
- **Reproducibility**: all stochastic elements seeded through Hydra config
- **Debuggability**: `mode=debug` runs 2 batches end-to-end with full logging
- **Extensibility**: new methods added via `@register("name")` without touching train loop

```{dot}
//| label: fig-principles
//| fig-cap: "Design principle hierarchy"
//| fig-width: 6.5
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Modular   [label="Modularity",      fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Repro     [label="Reproducibility", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Extend    [label="Extensibility",   fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Outcome   [label="Reliable Results", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c", width=1.8]

  Modular -> Outcome
  Repro   -> Outcome
  Extend  -> Outcome
}
```

---

## Components

| Component | Role | Key file | Config key |
|-----------|------|----------|------------|
| Component A | [describe role] | `src/methods/*/model.py` | `method.comp_a.*` |
| Component B | [describe role] | `src/methods/*/lit_module.py` | `method.comp_b.*` |
| DataModule | data loading + splits | `src/data/*.py` | `dataset.*` |
| Trainer | training loop + callbacks | `src/train.py` | `trainer.*` |

```{dot}
//| label: fig-components
//| fig-cap: "Component interaction at runtime"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.2
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.4]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph col1 {
    rank=same
    DM  [label="DataModule",  fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Cfg [label="Hydra Config", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph col2 {
    rank=same
    CA [label="Component A"]
    CB [label="Component B"]
  }
  subgraph col3 {
    rank=same
    Trainer [label="Trainer", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    MLflow  [label="MLflow",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  DM  -> CA
  DM  -> CB
  Cfg -> CA
  Cfg -> CB
  CA -> Trainer
  CB -> Trainer
  Trainer -> MLflow
}
```

---

## Training Flow

- **Epoch loop**: `Trainer.fit()` calls `training_step` → gradient update → `validation_step`
- **Checkpointing**: best model saved by `val_loss` (lower is better); path in `latest_checkpoint.json`
- **LR schedule**: `ReduceLROnPlateau` — no dependency on `max_epochs`
- **Early stopping**: patience = [N] epochs on `val_loss`

```{dot}
//| label: fig-train-flow
//| fig-cap: "Training loop control flow"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.5, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Batch [label="Batch",    fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Fwd   [label="Forward",  fillcolor="#343a40"]
  Loss  [label="Loss",     fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
  Opt   [label="Optimiser"]
  Ckpt  [label="Checkpoint", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Batch -> Fwd -> Loss -> Opt -> Ckpt
}
```
